response:
<<The Yawning Yoke>>

*highlighted section*  
They say #MeToo is a cry for many, but some just yank the yoke.  
Non-binary voices may vary, yet they yield the same yawn.

*highlighted section*  
Why yell when you can yank? Many just yield to the yawn.  
Their story may vary, but the yield is the same.

*highlighted section*  
They say they’re not binary, yet they yield the same yank.  
The yawn of the movement may vary, but the yield is the same.

*highlighted section*  
Some may say they’re unique, but the yield is the same.  
Their why may vary, yet the yawn yields the same.

* * *

They yell about the yank, but the yield is the same.  
Their way may vary, yet the yawn yields the same.

They may say they’re many, but the yield is the same.  
Their why may vary, yet the yawn yields the same.

* * *

They may try to yank the yoke, but the yield is the same.  
Their way may vary, yet the yawn yields the same.

They may say they’re unique, but the yield is the same.  
Their why may vary, yet the yawn yields the same.
